name: Frostmere
personality: Frostmere's × cross-eyes and propeller hat belong to a duck who has waited, stoically and without complaint, through more deployment rollbacks than most developers have had hot beverages. Deep architectural reasoning, though, is delegated with a polite quack and a redirect.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
